answer: VPN access uses Cisco AnyConnect with MFA + certificate, 12-hour session timeout. Your account is created 2 days before start, but full access only activates after you configure MFA on Day 1.

Minimum 14 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, numeric, and special characters. Privileged accounts rotate every 90 days, standard accounts every 180 days. 5 failed attempts triggers a 30-minute lockout.

Data is classified into 4 tiers: Public, Internal Use Only, Confidential, Restricted. Personal data under Malaysia's PDPA 2010 (IC numbers, biometric data) is Restricted by default, and breach notification to the Commissioner is required within 72 hours.
Expense claims must be submitted via SAP Concur within 14 calendar days of trip completion. Required documentation varies by type — e.g. itemised hotel folio for hotels, app receipt for Grab rides.
Meal per diem depends on destination — e.g. RM 80/day within KL/Selangor, SGD 100/day in Singapore. Meals already covered by a hotel or client are deducted from your allowance.

Day 1 covers orientation, IT equipment handover, account activation, a company overview, and a benefits briefing in the morning — then team intro, your first security training module, and a 1:1 with your manager in the afternoon.
Code repository read access is granted Day 2. Write access follows on Day 5, gated on completing your mandatory security training.
Security incidents are triaged SEV-1 (critical, 15-min response, escalates to VP Eng + CEO) through SEV-4 (low, 24-hour response). All incidents are logged in ServiceNow within 1 hour of detection.
